% Muñoz-Tamayo 2026
% program to select the observed variables

function [Ym] = OED_ATout(X)

%Defining the rumen volume 

V_l = 0.74 ;%Volume in the liquid phase of the rumen, L (Communication Belanche et al., 2017)
V_g = 0.06 ;%Volume in the gas phase of the rumen, L (Communication Belanche et al., 2017)

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% State Variables
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

Z_ndf = X(1);
Z_nsc = X(2);
Z_pro = X(3);
S_su = X(4);
S_aa = X(5);
S_ac = X(6);
S_bu = X(7);
S_pr = X(8);
S_IN = X(9);
S_IC = X(10);
S_h2 = X(11);
S_ch4 = X(12);
X_su = X(13);
X_aa = X(14);
X_h2 = X(15);
Sg_co2 = X(16);
Sg_h2 = X(17);
Sg_ch4 = X(18);
S_br = X(19);

%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Output Variables 
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

Ym(1)= S_ac;
Ym(2)= S_bu;
Ym(3)= S_pr;
Ym(4)= (50*Sg_co2*((195447214458445995625269784791965247771667868987040913516162517879*S_IC)/7622493146550525315498565580505461809357049526195512771912663040 + (450465865858842165281*S_ch4)/2082914827658854400 + (450465865858842165281*S_h2)/2082914827658854400 - (1829078211542602720173134059526805495527793697365081*Sg_h2)/36537540933272572955092120817907075491398313574400 - (85519603762040814091573180601022357631500698583819*Sg_ch4)/1141798154164767904846628775559596109106197299200))/(3*((8650717*Sg_h2)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_ch4)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_co2)/20000));
Ym(5)= (50*Sg_h2*((195447214458445995625269784791965247771667868987040913516162517879*S_IC)/7622493146550525315498565580505461809357049526195512771912663040 + (450465865858842165281*S_ch4)/2082914827658854400 + (450465865858842165281*S_h2)/2082914827658854400 - (1829078211542602720173134059526805495527793697365081*Sg_h2)/36537540933272572955092120817907075491398313574400 - (85519603762040814091573180601022357631500698583819*Sg_ch4)/1141798154164767904846628775559596109106197299200))/(3*((8650717*Sg_h2)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_ch4)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_co2)/20000));
Ym(6)= (50*Sg_ch4*((195447214458445995625269784791965247771667868987040913516162517879*S_IC)/7622493146550525315498565580505461809357049526195512771912663040 + (450465865858842165281*S_ch4)/2082914827658854400 + (450465865858842165281*S_h2)/2082914827658854400 - (1829078211542602720173134059526805495527793697365081*Sg_h2)/36537540933272572955092120817907075491398313574400 - (85519603762040814091573180601022357631500698583819*Sg_ch4)/1141798154164767904846628775559596109106197299200))/(3*((8650717*Sg_h2)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_ch4)/20000 + (8650717*Sg_co2)/20000));
Ym(7)= S_br;
